details.test: Task 1: Plan Sunday visit 9-11am with children program ages 5-10
Task 2: Register for earliest free weekday class after 5pm this month
Task 3: Request room reservation for 8-12 people Wednesday 7-9pm
Task 4: Save three recent forgiveness sermons to Watch Later
Task 5: Sign up for Saturday volunteer role under 3 hours/week
Task 6: Submit $25 one-time pledge to Youth Ministry fund
Task 7: Save two non-overlapping events in same week to My Events
Task 8: Request morning pastoral counseling next week (marriage)
